name: recall
description: RECALL - Persistent memory system for coding agents

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/mcp-server.ts --format esm --dts --clean --external bun:sqlite && bun -e "const fs=require('fs');['dist/index.js','dist/mcp-server.js'].forEach(f=>{const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node'))throw new Error(f+' missing expected shebang');fs.writeFileSync(f,c.replace('#!/usr/bin/env node','#!/usr/bin/env bun'))})"

author: edheltzel
